finding: The tested finalizer and deterministic workflow rewriter are committed, but the authoritative Cloudflare deployment workflow does not yet contain the finalizer test, finalization step, manifest upload, or manifest summary wiring.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed source and test logic

evidence_strength: deterministic contract verification plus direct inspection of the authoritative workflow blob
uncertainty: No trusted GitHub Actions run executed the new verifier in this run.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository workflow structure, blob identities, result classifications, and commit identifiers were processed. No secret values or private research records were read.
falsification_route: Run the verifier against a future authoritative workflow. This finding is falsified when all four required wiring checks are present and the verifier exits successfully.
limits: No resolving Pages hostname was proven.
No claim about scientific truth or medical efficacy is made.
